meta.name: description
meta.content: EduMaster is a mobile-first SSC JE / RRB JE preparation platform with courses, mock tests, daily quiz, live classes, analytics, and AI coaching.
meta.title: EduMaster | SSC JE & RRB JE Prep Platform

aside.class: hidden w-[280px] shrink-0 border-r border-white/60 bg-[var(--card-dark)] px-5 py-6 text-white shadow-[0_24px_80px_rgba(15,23,42,0.2)] lg:flex lg:flex-col

div.class: flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-white/10
mt-8 rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-white/8 p-5
flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-white/12

button.class: flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium transition bg-white text-[var(--ink)] shadow-sm
flex w-full items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium transition text-white/72 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white

mt-auto flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/12 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-white/74 transition hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white

header.class: sticky top-0 z-20 border-b border-white/60 bg-[var(--page-bg)]/90 px-4 py-4 backdrop-blur sm:px-6 lg:px-8

div.class: mx-auto flex max-w-7xl flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between

h1.class: mt-1 hidden text-2xl font-semibold text-[var(--ink)] sm:block

div.h1: SSC JE / RRB JE prep operating system

div.class: flex w-full flex-col gap-3 lg:w-auto lg:min-w-[520px]
flex items-center gap-3 rounded-[22px] border border-[var(--line)] bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm

input.placeholder: Search courses, lessons, tests, live classes, saved topics...
input.class: w-full bg-transparent text-sm text-[var(--ink)] outline-none placeholder:text-[var(--ink-soft)]

div.class: hidden items-center gap-3 rounded-full border border-[var(--line)] bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm sm:flex
mx-auto mt-3 flex max-w-7xl gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1 lg:hidden

button.class: shrink-0 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition bg-[var(--ink)] text-white
shrink-0 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition border border-[var(--line)] bg-white text-[var(--ink-soft)]
shrink-0 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition border border-[var(--line)] bg-white text-[var(--ink-soft)]

shrink-0 rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] transition border border-[var(--line)] bg-white text-[var(--ink-soft)]

main.class: mx-auto flex w-full max-w-7xl flex-1 flex-col px-4 pb-28 pt-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

div.class: rounded-[34px] bg-[var(--card-dark)] p-6 text-white shadow-[0_30px_120px_rgba(15,23,42,0.3)] sm:p-8

h2.class: mt-4 max-w-3xl text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight sm:text-4xl

div.h2: Finish one high-value lesson, one timed practice block, and one quick revision loop.

p.class: mt-4 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-7 text-white/70 sm:text-base

div.p: Your fastest progress path is to resume Thevenin, Norton and Maximum Power Transfer before opening a new topic.

button.class: rounded-full bg-white px-5 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--ink)] shadow-sm transition hover:scale-[1.01]

div.class: rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-white/90 p-4 shadow-[0_18px_46px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur sm:rounded-[28px] sm:p-5 sm:shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]
flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] text-[var(--accent-rust)] sm:h-12 sm:w-12

p.class: mt-3 text-xs leading-6 text-[var(--ink-soft)] sm:mt-4 sm:text-sm

div.class: rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-white/90 p-4 shadow-[0_18px_46px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur sm:rounded-[28px] sm:p-5 sm:shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]
flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] text-[var(--accent-rust)] sm:h-12 sm:w-12

p.class: mt-3 text-xs leading-6 text-[var(--ink-soft)] sm:mt-4 sm:text-sm

div.class: rounded-[24px] border border-white/70 bg-white/90 p-4 shadow-[0_18px_46px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] backdrop-blur sm:rounded-[28px] sm:p-5 sm:shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]
flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] text-[var(--accent-rust)] sm:h-12 sm:w-12

p.class: mt-3 text-xs leading-6 text-[var(--ink-soft)] sm:mt-4 sm:text-sm

div.class: rounded-[34px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_24px_90px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between

div.p: Keep the next action obvious: finish the active lesson, protect the quiz streak, and only then open a fresh mock or live class.

button.class: w-full rounded-[24px] border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--accent-cream)] p-4 text-left transition hover:border-[var(--accent-rust)]/40

div.class: mt-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-white

div.p: Attempt today’s 5-question quiz before midnight to protect your streak.

button.class: w-full rounded-[24px] border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--accent-cream)] p-4 text-left transition hover:border-[var(--accent-rust)]/40

div.class: mt-1 flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-white

div.p: Power Systems Live Marathon begins soon. Tap in early to ask doubts.

div.class: rounded-[30px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(15,23,42,0.07)]
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between

button.class: w-full rounded-[26px] border border-[var(--line)] p-4 text-left transition hover:border-[var(--accent-rust)]

div.p: Resume: Thevenin, Norton and Maximum Power Transfer at 29:40

div.class: mb-2 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-[var(--ink-soft)]
rounded-[30px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(15,23,42,0.07)]
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between

span.class: rounded-full bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--danger)]
rounded-full bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--success)]

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] px-3 py-3 text-sm text-[var(--ink-soft)]

div.div: Login on QA Android Automation • 13 Apr, 12:22 pm

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] px-3 py-3 text-sm text-[var(--ink-soft)]

div.div: Logout on QA Android Automation • 13 Apr, 12:22 pm

div.class: rounded-2xl bg-[var(--accent-cream)] px-3 py-3 text-sm text-[var(--ink-soft)]

div.div: Login on QA Android Automation • 13 Apr, 11:53 am

div.class: rounded-[30px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(15,23,42,0.07)]
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between
rounded-[24px] border border-dashed border-[var(--line)] p-6 text-sm text-[var(--ink-soft)]

div.div: Save important topics while studying and they will appear here for faster revision.

div.class: rounded-[30px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(15,23,42,0.07)]
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between

div.p: Resume Thevenin, Norton and Maximum Power Transfer and finish that study streak before starting a new topic.

section.class: rounded-[30px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-6 shadow-[0_22px_70px_rgba(15,23,42,0.07)]

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between

button.class: rounded-[24px] border border-[var(--line)] bg-white p-4 text-left transition hover:border-[var(--accent-rust)] hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]

span.class: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-[#fff3eb] text-[var(--accent-rust)]

button.class: rounded-[24px] border border-[var(--line)] bg-white p-4 text-left transition hover:border-[var(--accent-rust)] hover:shadow-[0_18px_34px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]

span.class: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-[#fff3eb] text-[var(--accent-rust)]

div.h3: SSC JE General Awareness Revision Vault

div.class: fixed inset-x-3 bottom-3 z-30 rounded-[28px] border border-white/70 bg-white/92 p-2 shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(15,23,42,0.14)] backdrop-blur lg:hidden

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 rounded-2xl px-2 py-3 text-[11px] font-medium bg-[var(--accent-rust)] text-white

flex flex-col items-center gap-1 rounded-2xl px-2 py-3 text-[11px] font-medium text-[var(--ink-soft)]
